project_structure.description: Monorepo with .NET backend API and React frontend UI for Tactic Management system

subprojects.description: .NET backend API using CQRS pattern with MediatR
React frontend with TanStack Query for state management

decisions.why: Demonstrates IMemoryCache pattern for performance optimization; applicable to search result caching strategy
Defines role-based authorization filtering integrated into search queries via TacticReadAuthorizationService
Establishes CQRS pattern used for GetUserTacticsQuery search implementation
OfferCode is database-generated IDENTITY column; impacts search indexing strategy

persona.why: Defines user roles (Requester, ProofReader, etc.) who perform search operations

target_architecture.why: Documents API architecture including search endpoint design and CQRS pattern

components.why: Main search UI component with filter controls and results table
Search state management with debouncing (300ms) and filter handling

services.why: Core search implementation with GetUserTacticsWithFiltersAsync and GetAllTacticsAsync methods
CQRS query handler orchestrating search with authorization and pagination
Multi-field text search implementation across Description, Notes, OfferVerbiage, etc.
Frontend API client for getTactics() search endpoint

models.why: Core Tactic entity with searchable fields (Description, Notes, OfferVerbiage, OfferCode)
Filter criteria object encapsulating all search parameters
CQRS query record defining search parameters (term, status, filters, pagination)

apis.why: GetTactics endpoint accepting search term, filters, pagination, and sort parameters

tests.why: Unit tests for search functionality with various filter combinations
Tests for multi-field search term filtering logic
Frontend tests for search state management and debouncing
